positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest meeting a deep cosmic void. Central composition featuring bioluminescent root systems forming organic geometric patterns, intertwining with stylized flora and fauna. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, ethereal teal, brilliant gold, and stark white, utilizing negative space effectively. Clean silhouettes are essential. High contrast, intricate line work, graphic novel style merged with sacred geometry. Suitable for a repeating apparel print layout. Art deco influence, volumetric lighting, extreme detail, 8K resolution.
